title: Estepona Half Day Fishing Charter: Costs, Tips and Choices for 2026
html:
Fishing enthusiasts heading to the Costa del Sol should consider a half day charter from Estepona's Puerto Deportivo, with shared trip prices starting around EUR 60 per person. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can find verified operators offering everything from budget friendly trips to private skippered outings.

How much does a half day fishing charter in Estepona cost?

A shared half day trip typically costs EUR 60, 80 per person, while private charters start from EUR 350 for a half day. Prices vary depending on boat size, crew, and included tackle. You can boat rental Estepona for your chosen dates.

  • Shared fishing trip: EUR 60, 80 per person (half day, bait and rods included)
  • Small motorboat (self-drive, no licence needed up to 15hp): from EUR 150 for a half day
  • Catamaran full day (crewed, for groups): from EUR 800 for a full day
  • Private skippered yacht (half day, up to 8 guests): from EUR 450

For a comprehensive overview of available options, check the boat rental Estepona page on BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Estepona?

Most fishing charters depart from Puerto Deportivo de Estepona, a well equipped marina in the town centre. From here you can reach fishing grounds around the Punta de la Doncella or head west towards the rock of Gibraltar. Other departure points include the nearby Puerto de la Duquesa and, for longer trips, the marina at Sotogrande. The waters off Cabo de Gata are also popular for bottom fishing, though that requires a longer cruise. One option worth a look is the Limpopo listing.

Which boat to rent for a half day fishing trip?

Your choice of boat determines the range, comfort and fishing style.

  1. Rigid inflatable boat (RIB), ideal for speed and reaching offshore wrecks; capacity 6, 8 guests; from EUR 250 half day.
  2. Small motorboat (bowrider or centre console), good for inshore trolling; capacity 4, 5 guests; from EUR 150 half day.
  3. Axopar 28 (e.g. Limpopo), versatile cabin boat for groups; capacity 8 guests; from EUR 400 half day; see the Limpopo listing on BoatHire24 for details.
  4. Flybridge motor yacht, comfortable offshore fishing for up to 10 guests; from EUR 600 half day.
  5. Skippered catamaran, stable platform for drift fishing; capacity 10, 12 guests; from EUR 500 half day.

Do you need a licence to fish from a charter boat in Estepona?

No, a fishing licence is not required when you are on a skippered charter; the operator holds the necessary permits. If you rent a boat without a skipper, Spanish regulations require a licence for boats over 15hp. For smaller outboards (up to 15hp) no licence is needed, but the operator will confirm exact requirements.

A useful tip: the morning bite is often strongest off Estepona during the summer months, especially around the rocky outcrops near Cabo de la Plata. Arrive at the marina by 7.30 to make the most of the early action.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 60, 80 shared / EUR 150, 600 private half day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 4 hours (half day)
  • Capacity: up to 8 guests on standard charters
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Estepona

How do I book a fishing charter in Estepona?

You can compare and book through BoatHire24, which lists verified operators with transparent prices and availability.

What species of fish can I catch off Estepona?

Common catches include sea bass, red mullet, bream and occasionally tuna during the summer migration.

Can I keep the fish I catch?

Yes, most charters allow you to keep your catch within daily legal limits; the crew will help you prepare it.

Is it possible to rent a boat without a skipper if I have a licence?

Yes, if you hold an ICC or Spanish equivalent, you can rent a motorboat up to 8m for a self drive half day from around EUR 180.

Planning your 2026 fishing adventure around Estepona is easy with BoatHire24, where you can browse genuine reviews and secure your ideal charter. Whether you choose a shared trip or a private outing, the waters of the Alboran Sea offer a rewarding experience. Boat owners can also use the platform to list their own vessels and attract bookings.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Estepona and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
